posts.community: Viviana Power Tech - Plugged into India’s Power Boom
posts.text: Viviana Power - IMG_4603 1146×1624 240 KB IMG_4604 1146×2078 365 KB Company reported bumper set of number and ready to rock in mainboard. 25x growth since IPO at Rs. 55 per share in September 2022. ₹100 Cr greenfield capex marks the beginning of backward integration into high-value power equipment manufacturing. The shift can structurally improve margins, reduce dependence on EPC cycles and create stronger return economics over time. From executing transmission projects → now targeting ownership of product manufacturing across transformers, substations and allied equipment. Current EPC executi…
